debug_info.goal:
numbers : List ℤ
h_precond : longestIncreasingSubsequence_precond numbers
⊢ longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond numbers (longestIncreasingSubsequence numbers h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
classical
  unfold longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond
  simpa using (by
    constructor
    · exact List.mem_of_mem_filter (by
        refine List.mem_of_mem_append_left ?_
        exact List.mem_cons_self _ _)
    ·
      intro x hx
      have hx' : x ∈
          ((numbers.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ List.map (fun sub => x :: sub) acc) [[]]
              |>.map List.reverse).filter (fun l => List.Pairwise (· < ·) l) |>.map List.length) := hx
      have : x ≤ x := le_rfl
      exact le_trans this (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _)))
  -- !benchmark @end proof

    have hmem0 :

          ((numbers.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (fun sub => x :: sub)) [[]]).map List.reverse
              |>.filter (fun l => List.Pairwise (· < ·) l) |>.map (·.length)) := by

          ([] : List Int) ∈
            ((numbers.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (fun sub => x :: sub)) [[]]).map List.reverse) := by
        refine List.mem_map.2 ?_
        refine ⟨[], ?_, by simp⟩
        have : ([] : List Int) ∈ (numbers.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (fun sub => x :: sub)) [[]]) := by
          simpa using (List.foldl_mem_init (l := numbers)
            (f := fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (fun sub => x :: sub)) (init := ([[]] : List (List Int))))
        simpa using this
      have hpair : List.Pairwise (· < ·) ([] : List Int) := by simp
      have hmemnil' :

                |>.filter (fun l => List.Pairwise (· < ·) l)) := by
        exact List.mem_filter.2 ⟨hmemnil, by simpa [hpair]⟩
      have : (0 : Nat) ∈

                |>.filter (fun l => List.Pairwise (· < ·) l)).map (·.length)) := by
        refine List.mem_map.2 ?_
        exact ⟨[], hmemnil', by simp⟩
      simpa using this
    refine And.intro ?_ ?_
    · exact hmem0
    · intro x hx
      exact Nat.zero_le x
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  cases numbers with
  | nil =>
      simp [longestIncreasingSubsequence, longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond]
  | cons a t =>
      cases t with
      | nil =>
          simp [longestIncreasingSubsequence, longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond]
      | cons b t' =>
          simp [longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  by_cases h : numbers = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestIncreasingSubsequence, longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond]
  · cases numbers with
    | nil =>
        cases h rfl
    | cons first rest =>
        cases rest with
        | nil =>
            simp [longestIncreasingSubsequence, longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond]
        | cons second rest' =>
            simp [longestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond]
  -- !benchmark @end proof
